content.title: Slabs
content.subtitle: Durable, level, and versatile concrete slabs by Maxima Concrete. From homes to industrial sites, we build the strong foundations every project needs.

content.title: More Than Grey Squares
content.subtitle: Concrete slabs provide a strong, reliable foundation for a wide range of residential and commercial applications. Built for durability and long-term performance, they offer the stability needed for everything from patios and garages to warehouses, walkways, and outdoor living spaces.
content.paragraph1: Concrete slabs are one of the most versatile construction solutions available. Whether used for patios, garages, shed foundations, sidewalks, or outdoor living areas, they create a smooth, level surface designed to withstand daily use and changing weather conditions. Their durability and low-maintenance nature make them a practical choice for both homeowners and businesses.
content.paragraph2: At Maxima Concrete, every slab is installed with proper site preparation, grading, and reinforcement to ensure long-lasting performance. From residential projects to large commercial applications, our team delivers quality workmanship and reliable results. The outcome is a solid foundation that provides strength, functionality, and lasting value for years to come.

content.description: Uneven basement floors? Damp garage surfaces? A properly installed concrete slab transforms those problem areas into clean, level, and moisture-resistant foundations ready for whatever comes next. Our slabs provide the perfect base for:

content.title: Commercial & Industrial Slabs Finish Options

styles.title: Broom-Finish
styles.description: Classic slip-resistant texture with clean lines, offering all-season traction and timeless appeal.

styles.title: Stamped & Colored
styles.description: Decorative patterns and rich colors that mimic natural stone or brick, creating a distinctive look with enhanced curb appeal.

styles.title: Exposed Aggregate & Buff Wash
styles.description: A warm, natural finish that reveals exposed stone textures, adding depth, character, and a refined look to any concrete surface.

styles.title: Paver, Brick or Natural Stone
styles.description: Enhance your concrete design with paver, brick, or natural stone accents that add texture, character, and timeless appeal.

content.description: Slabs also serve as the workhorses of industry. From warehouses to storefronts, parking lots, and plazas, Maxima Concrete delivers heavy-load-ready slabs that perform under constant use.

items.question: How thick should a slab be?
items.answer: It depends on use — residential slabs are typically 4–6 inches, while commercial or heavy-load slabs may be thicker with added reinforcement.

items.question: How long does it take to cure?
items.answer: A slab is usually ready for foot traffic in 24–48 hours and reaches full strength in about 28 days.

items.question: What can concrete slabs be used for?
items.answer: Slabs serve as a stable, level base for sheds, garages, patios, hot tubs, AC units, workshops, and equipment pads.
